title: dortmanna ensiformis
intro: Dortmanna ensiformis, also known as Dortmann's shield fern or shield fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Dortmanna ensiformis lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, and its ability to lower fever and reduce pain. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna ensiformis are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
